overall_summary: Big gap to reference, but the data shows exactly where it is hiding. Attack these points. Current gap: 77.424s slower than reference. The biggest opportunity is Sector 2 (+59.821s), where 56.9 km/h is being left on the table through the corners. Executing these fixes could recover 2.10s — a completely different lap time.

priority_actions.issue: Apex speed is 57.8 km/h below reference (36.6 vs 94.4 km/h). Significant corner exit speed deficit.
priority_actions.instruction: Despite a late brake point, apex speed is below reference — car not rotating. Use higher initial brake pressure to pitch the car in, trail off through apex. Hit 94 km/h and the exit speed takes care of itself.
priority_actions.evidence: Apex: 36.6 km/h vs 94.4 km/h reference (-57.8 km/h).
